meta.title: 艺术与社会变革
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on art and social change in Chinese: idioms, avant-garde art, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 예술과 사회 변혁 담화: 성어, 전위 예술, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「先锋艺术」(xiānfēng yìshù) means "avant-garde art", art that breaks conventions ahead of its time.
explanation.ko: 「先锋艺术」(xiānfēng yìshù)는 시대를 앞서 관습을 깨는 '전위 예술'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「先锋艺术」是什么意思？(What does 先锋艺术 mean?)

explanation.en: 「振聋发聩」is an idiom meaning "a sound or statement so powerful it can wake even the deaf", i.e., deeply shocking and awakening.
explanation.ko: 「振聋发聩」는 '귀머거리도 깨울 만큼 강렬한 소리나 말'을 뜻하는 성어로, 매우 충격적이고 각성을 일으킨다는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「振聋发聩」是什么意思？(What does 振聋发聩 mean?)
choices: 声音或言论极具震撼力，能唤醒麻木的人(having a shocking impact powerful enough to awaken the numb)

explanation.en: This phrase describes artists using their creative work to directly engage with and influence social issues.
explanation.ko: 이 표현은 예술가가 창작을 통해 사회적 이슈에 직접 개입하고 영향을 미치는 것을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「艺术介入社会」是什么意思？(What does 艺术介入社会 mean?)
choices: 艺术家通过创作直接参与和影响社会议题(artists directly engaging with and influencing social issues through their work)

explanation.en: 「移风易俗」is an idiom meaning "to change old customs and social norms".
explanation.ko: 「移风易俗」는 '낡은 풍습을 바꾼다'는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「移风易俗」是什么意思？(What does 移风易俗 mean?)
choices: 改变旧的风气和习俗(changing old customs and social norms)

explanation.en: 「艺术的社会功能」refers to art's role in reflecting, critiquing, and driving social change.
explanation.ko: 「艺术的社会功能」는 예술이 사회 변화를 반영·비판·추동하는 역할을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「艺术的社会功能」通常指什么？(What does 艺术的社会功能 usually refer to?)
choices: 艺术能够反映、批判和推动社会变革的作用(art's role in reflecting, critiquing, and driving social change)

explanation.en: 「先锋艺术」means "avant-garde art".
explanation.ko: 「先锋艺术」는 '전위 예술'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 这场展览展出的作品大多属于___，挑战了传统的审美观念。(Most of the works exhibited in this show belong to avant-garde art, challenging traditional aesthetic concepts.)

explanation.en: 「振聋发聩」describes a work with a powerful, awakening impact.
explanation.ko: 「振聋发聩」는 강렬하고 각성을 일으키는 힘을 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 这部作品以___的力量，揭露了社会长期忽视的不公现象。(This work, with a shocking and awakening power, exposed the injustice that society had long ignored.)

explanation.en: 「艺术介入社会」means "art engaging directly with society".
explanation.ko: 「艺术介入社会」는 예술이 사회 문제에 직접 개입하는 것을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 越来越多的当代艺术家选择让___，用作品直接回应现实议题。(More and more contemporary artists are choosing to let art engage with society, using their work to directly respond to real-world issues.)

explanation.en: 「移风易俗」means "to change old customs".
explanation.ko: 「移风易俗」는 '낡은 풍습을 바꾸다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这场文化运动旨在___，摒弃落后陈旧的封建陋习。(This cultural movement aims to change old customs and social norms, discarding backward and outdated feudal practices.)

explanation.en: This describes art's role in reflecting and driving social change.
explanation.ko: 이는 예술의 사회 변화 반영·추동 역할을 설명한다.

questions.prompt: 很多历史学家认为，___往往体现在其对社会思潮的深刻反映与引领上。(Many historians believe that art's social function is often reflected in its profound reflection of and leadership over social trends.)
choices: 艺术能够反映、批判和推动社会变革的作用

explanation.en: 「揭示」means "to reveal".
explanation.ko: 「揭示」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这幅画作以强烈的视觉冲击，___了战争带给普通民众的深重苦难。(This painting, with a powerful visual impact, exposed the profound suffering that war brought to ordinary people.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其让艺术沦为纯粹的商业消遣，___不如让它承担起启迪思想的社会责任。(Rather than letting art degenerate into pure commercial entertainment, it's better to let it bear the social responsibility of enlightening minds.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这件作品___在当时引发了巨大争议，___最终被公认为艺术史上的里程碑。(Even though this piece sparked huge controversy at the time, it was ultimately recognized as a milestone in art history.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 这场艺术运动之所以能够推动社会变革，___是因为它成功地将艺术表达与公众意识觉醒结合了起来。(The reason this art movement was able to drive social change is precisely because it successfully combined artistic expression with public awareness-raising.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一件作品一旦触动了公众内心深处的共鸣，___能够产生超越艺术本身的社会影响力。(Once a work touches the deep resonance in the public's heart, it can generate social influence that transcends art itself.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，艺术推动社会变革的力量___源自其对人心的深刻触动。(In the final analysis, the power of art to drive social change still originates from its profound touching of the human heart.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，艺术家的洞察力与时代的需求___成就了一场深刻的艺术革命。(From this we can see that both the artist's insight and the needs of the era jointly brought about a profound artistic revolution.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，真正具有影响力的艺术作品___能够超越单纯的审美范畴，触及深层的社会议题。(As everyone knows, truly influential works of art are often able to transcend mere aesthetic categories and touch on deeper social issues.)

explanation.en: 「挑战」(tiǎozhàn) means "to challenge".
explanation.ko: 「挑战」(tiǎozhàn)는 '도전하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这场行为艺术表演___了观众对传统艺术边界的固有认知。(This performance art piece challenged the audience's fixed understanding of the boundaries of traditional art.)

explanation.en: 「描绘」(miáohuì) means "to depict/portray".
explanation.ko: 「描绘」(miáohuì)는 '묘사하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这位艺术家的作品常常___社会边缘群体的生存状态，引人深思。(This artist's works often depict the living conditions of marginalized social groups, prompting deep reflection.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 让它承担起〜: 不如让它承担起 (not 让它不如承担起).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '让它承担起〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如让它承担起'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其让艺术沦为纯粹的商业消遣，让它不如承担起启迪思想的社会责任。(Rather than letting art degenerate into pure commercial entertainment, it's better to let it bear the social responsibility of enlightening minds.) — find the error
choices: 与其让艺术沦为纯粹的商业消遣，不如让它承担起启迪思想的社会责任。
与其让艺术沦为纯粹的商业消遣，让它不如承担起启迪思想的社会责任。
与其让艺术沦为纯粹的商业消遣，不如承担让它起启迪思想的社会责任。
与其让艺术沦为纯粹的商业消遣，让它承担不如起启迪思想的社会责任。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这场艺术运动之所以能够推动社会变革，因为是它成功地将艺术表达与公众意识觉醒结合了起来。(The reason this art movement was able to drive social change is precisely because it successfully combined artistic expression with public awareness-raising.) — find the error
choices: 这场艺术运动之所以能够推动社会变革，是因为它成功地将艺术表达与公众意识觉醒结合了起来。
这场艺术运动之所以能够推动社会变革，因为是它成功地将艺术表达与公众意识觉醒结合了起来。
这场艺术运动之所以能够推动社会变革，是它因为成功地将艺术表达与公众意识觉醒结合了起来。
这场艺术运动之所以能够推动社会变革，它是因为成功地将艺术表达与公众意识觉醒结合了起来。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一件作品一旦触动了公众内心深处的共鸣，能够才产生超越艺术本身的社会影响力。(Once a work touches the deep resonance in the public's heart, it can generate social influence that transcends art itself.) — find the error
choices: 一件作品一旦触动了公众内心深处的共鸣，就能够产生超越艺术本身的社会影响力。
一件作品一旦触动了公众内心深处的共鸣，能够才产生超越艺术本身的社会影响力。
一件作品一旦触动了公众内心深处的共鸣，才能够产生超越艺术本身的社会影响力。
一件作品一旦触动了公众内心深处的共鸣，能够产生才超越艺术本身的社会影响力。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其让艺术沦为纯粹的商业消遣，不如让它承担起启迪思想的社会责任 ("Rather than letting art degenerate into pure commercial entertainment, it's better to let it bear the social responsibility of enlightening minds").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其让艺术沦为纯粹的商业消遣，不如让它承担起启迪思想的社会责任' (예술을 순수한 상업적 오락거리로 전락시키느니 차라리 그것이 사상을 계몽하는 사회적 책임을 지도록 하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其让艺术沦为纯粹的商业消遣，__________承担起启迪思想的社会责任。(Rather than letting art degenerate into pure commercial entertainment, it's better to let it bear the social responsibility of enlightening minds.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一件作品一旦触动了公众内心深处的共鸣，就能够产生超越艺术本身的社会影响力 ("Once a work touches the deep resonance in the public's heart, it can generate social influence that transcends art itself").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一件作品一旦触动了公众内心深处的共鸣，就能够产生超越艺术本身的社会影响力' (작품은 일단 대중 마음속 깊은 공감을 건드리면 예술 자체를 초월하는 사회적 영향력을 낼 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一件作品一旦触动了公众内心深处的共鸣，__________产生超越艺术本身的社会影响力。(Once a work touches the deep resonance in the public's heart, it can generate social influence that transcends art itself.)
